permits.description: -  Install new plumbing for 3 bathrooms, kitchen and laundry.

A gut renovation of the existing house that will restore the building's original use as a single family home.  The scope of work includes the lifting and moving of the house within the property, a new poured concrete foundation, revised floor layouts, an all new envelope including windows, doors, siding, trim, insulation, and roofing.   All new mechanical systems will be installed and utilities will be replaced to city/utility connections.  New landscaping and onsite drainage systems will be installed, as well.
